h1.visual_description: Large, bold, sans-serif font, left-aligned at the top of a section.

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, bold, sans-serif font, centered above data visualizations.
h2.example_text: Q11 What factors influence your choice of print? (select all that apply)

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Survey response metadata displayed in small, centered, grey text below question headers.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page footer text located at the bottom right, following the format 'Online Survey | [page_number]'.
